docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED JUN-02-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, TERRY

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: BAD ADDRESS: PER RESIDENT, THE RESPONDENT DOES NOT LIVE AT THE LISTED ADDRESS. SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIANG, YING HUA AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, KEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED JUN-04-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CKG CONSTRUCTION AND ROOFING CORP.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,124.00 FILED BY LIANG, YING HUA AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, KEN CKG CONSTRUCTION AND ROOFING CORP. FONG, TERRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-24-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED JUL-17-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GUAN, KEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-24-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-24-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF YING HUA LIANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS KEN GUAN, CKG CONSTRUCTION & ROOFING CORP (CHAC KON NG HE), AND TERRY FONG ARE PRESENT. CANTONESE INTERPRETER WINNIE CHAN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) CHAC KON NG HE FILED BY DEFENDANT CKG CONSTRUCTION AND ROOFING CORP.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-24-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIANG, YING HUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUAN, KEN CKG CONSTRUCTION AND ROOFING CORP. FONG, TERRY $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,225.00, SINCE THE ROOFING COMPANY IS HELD LIABLE. THE EMPLOYEE KEN GUAN IS DISMISSED FROM THIS ACTION. ROOFING COMPANY/OWNER SHALL BE HELD LIABLE FOR $2450.00 (TWO THOUSAND FOUR HUNDRED & FIFTY DOLLARS) AND HOMEOWNER DEFENDANT FONG SHALL BE LIABLE FOR $550.00. (SEE ATTACHMENT FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FONG, TERRY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CKG CONSTRUCTION AND ROOFING CORP.
